name: Chicken Kurma
recipeIngredient: 6 cloves of garlic, peeled and chopped
3.5 to 4 pounds chicken (skinned, boned, and cut into about 2 inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind cloves, cardamom, cinnamon, coriander seeds, and cumin seeds with turmeric until you have a powder.
2. Chop garlic and ginger into a paste.
3. Combine the paste with yogurt and salt. Add chicken to this mixture and marinate for 2-3 hours.
4. Grind poppy seeds, cashews, and almonds in a blender or spice mill until you have a powder. Combine with shredded coconut and set aside.
5. Heat ghee in a large skillet and cook onions until golden brown. Add the poppy seed mixture and mix well.
6. Put chicken and yogurt marinade into a heavy bottom pot. Add onion mixture, fresh chiles, half the cilantro, and 1.5 cups water. Cook, uncovered, until chicken is tender and sauce thickens.
